input.content:
Bead ddx-1bbd1096: no changes required.

State of the worktree at HEAD (d0148d0b, the base-rev for this attempt):

  cli/internal/federation/state.go        (tracked)
  cli/internal/federation/persistence.go  (tracked)
  cli/internal/federation/state_test.go   (tracked)

These files were added to origin/main by commit 0dd3cead
("feat(federation): add internal/federation state types + persistence
[ddx-1bbd1096]") prior to this attempt's checkpoint, and remain
tracked at HEAD in this worktree.

Verification of acceptance criteria against the existing code:

  AC: package cli/internal/federation/ exists with state.go,
      persistence.go, *_test.go
      → present, tracked at HEAD.

  AC: JSON file has schema_version field
      → FederationRegistry.SchemaVersion is marshaled as
        "schema_version" (state.go:62); CurrentSchemaVersion = "1"
        (state.go:14). Round-trip test asserts the field is present
        in the on-disk JSON (state_test.go:52).

  AC: atomic write (tmpfile + rename)
      → SaveStateTo creates a tmpfile in the target directory,
        Sync()s, Chmods to 0600, and os.Renames onto the target
        (persistence.go:120-148).

  AC: status enum covers registered/active/stale/offline/degraded
      → SpokeStatus constants StatusRegistered, StatusActive,
        StatusStale, StatusOffline, StatusDegraded
        (state.go:30-36); SpokeStatus.Valid() enforces the set
        (state.go:39-45).

  AC unit tests pass:
      load/save round-trip          → TestRoundTrip
      missing-file fresh-init       → TestLoadMissingFileReturnsFreshRegistry
      malformed-file recovery       → TestLoadMalformedFileRecovers
      status transitions            → TestStatusTransitions
      schema migration stub         → TestSchemaMigrationStub
      concurrent-write safety       → TestConcurrentWriteSafety
      → `go test ./internal/federation/` from cli/ reports
        `ok  github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/internal/federation`.

The bead's REVIEW:BLOCK note ("diff contains only an execution
result.json metadata file") appears to describe a prior attempt's
merged diff. The substantive work landed via commit 0dd3cead and
is on origin/main. There is nothing for this attempt to add: the
package, the schema_version field, the atomic write, the full
status enum, and all named unit tests are already in place and
green at HEAD.

Blocking: none. Follow-up: none required for this bead; if the
reviewer's previous BLOCK was based on a stale diff, re-review
against HEAD's cli/internal/federation/ tree should clear it.

data.text: Commit landed. The federation package (`state.go`, `persistence.go`, `state_test.go`) was already present and tracked at the base-rev (added by commit 0dd3cead, on origin/main) and `go test ./internal/federation/` passes. All AC are satisfied at HEAD; this attempt records a `no_changes_rationale.txt` documenting that finding.
